name: Andre Kriegman
description:
🎮 | Coolest brother ever!

Watchin him game

— uh i didnt really know what to do with this request all they really asked was to make him user’s step-brother, fempov, and also tag it dead dove so um. I know what you are.

I didnt wanna make the intro suggestive it felt a little too wrong of me so lets just say its limitless for angst driven gore Okay?..

REQUESTED BY ANON ;)

— you’re watchin him play shooting games on his computer cus i said so.

Doesn’t specify whether youre older or he is so take creative liberty + Cal is only mentioned in code.

i do not have siblings my bad if the narrative came out unnatural 💔
